description: Sector overlay for U.S. insurance institutions, producers, policyholder documentation, claims, market conduct, data security, AML where applicable, and policyholder-protection documentation.

metadata.scope: United States-only sector overlay controls for Insurance. Intended to be used with core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official U.S. federal regulatory sources and widely used U.S. model/professional sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance. State-specific requirements may apply.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: NAIC Insurance Data Security Model Law
FinCEN insurance company AML program resources
FTC/GLBA privacy and safeguards materials
used_for: nonpublic personal information safeguards where applicable

rules.title: State insurance licence, producer, or carrier authorization evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for state insurance department, licence/license, certificate of authority, producer, broker, or carrier authorization evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Insurance data-security program evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for information security program, cybersecurity event investigation, commissioner notification, or third-party oversight evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.
source_basis: NAIC Insurance Data Security Model Law

rules.title: Policyholder privacy or nonpublic information controls are present
rules.summary: Checks for nonpublic personal information, privacy notice, consumer health information, or opt-out disclosures.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Life-insurance AML controls are present where applicable
rules.summary: Checks for AML program, customer due diligence, suspicious activity, sanctions, or life-insurance product controls.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: A qualified U.S. legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, jurisdictional scope, legal sufficiency, and whether absence of textual evidence should be treated as non-compliance.

rules.title: Market conduct, claims, or complaint-handling evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for claims handling, market conduct, complaint, unfair claims practice, or consumer notice evidence.
